calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-12-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Level 10 Profit, Inc., dba Church Produce, and Navjot Kaur.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

David Brand, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Specialty Finance Group, LLC, dba Bambu Finance.
Greg Tasich, Account Supervisor for plaintiff Specialty Finance Group, LLC, dba Bambu Finance, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Brand and Tasich appeared via ZOOM for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendants Level 10 Profit, Inc., dba Church Produce, or Navjot Kaur.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on January 13, 2020.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendants Level 10 Profit, Inc., dba Church Produce, and Navjot Kaur occurred on September 3, 2020, and was effectuated on September 14, 2020.
Default as to both defendants was entered on December 14, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on November 16, 2020.

Plaintiff Specialty Finance Group, LLC, dba Bambu Finance, submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Copy of the Merchant Agreement dated 9/23/2019.............................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Specialty Finance Group, LLC, dba Bambu Finance, and against the defaulted defendants Level 10 Profit, Inc., dba Church Produce, and Navjot Kaur, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $135,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $15,498.81.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $863.00.

Total - $154,186.81.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2020 Continued To Feb-23-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
